name: Diabetic Strawberry/Banana Milk Shake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Milk (skim and low fat work fine)
4 packages Sugar substitute (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend on the highest setting until smooth. The shake may take longer than expected due to the frozen strawberries, but they will help achieve the desired thickness of the drink.
Note: This recipe is flexible and not meant to be a strict formula. Adjust quantities as needed to suit your taste preferences.
